source_meta.source_document: Exeter and UHR Universal Head Bipolar System

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Exeter and UHR materials support the combined stem and bipolar head construct with dedicated operative instrumentation.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official Exeter product materials describe the polished cemented Exeter femoral stem family.
Official UHR materials describe the bipolar cup family with multiple outer diameters and compatible inner head sizes.
The UHR bipolar system is specified for compatible 22 mm, 26 mm, and 28 mm head sizes used with the Exeter stem construct.

PRODUCTS.Product Name: UHR Bipolar Head 36 mm for 22 mm Head
PRODUCTS.Product Notes: Official UHR bipolar system brochure lists catalogue number UH1-36-22 for 36 mm outer diameter with 22 mm head compatibility.

row.system_notes: Cemented hemiarthroplasty construct combining the Exeter femoral stem family with the UHR Universal Head Bipolar System.
